description: Has been really good and the SOC are very good as wellCalled quick when we had a trial attackOffers great demo support and setup.
author: Mark P.
pros: Protects and covers alot of items incl 365Quite in depth integrations incl third party AV which others dont do we are comparing now with
cons: Not simple install like some competitors to roll out - not fully integrated into other kaseya/datto products without seemless installation
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great product with timely action on security threats
description: This product largely gives you exactly what they promise, and that is really good.
author: Dre A.
pros: A product that proves real timely response to security incidents.
cons: Can be difficult setting up for large MSPs who manage thousands of clients with dozens of techs.

description: We lacked a 24-7 managed SOC option and RocketCyber was an effective option that has provided us a way of offering a real product that our customers could feel confident in.
author: Charles L.
pros: The client install level allowing individual endpoint detections give a price effective option to trying to make detections at infrastructure levels. Responsiveness of SOC calling for incident response is impressive.
cons: Issues in the past with exclusions have been improving. Non-incident specific support is through tickets only which is not as responsive as I would prefer.

author: Parker B.
pros: Integrations and ingestion of various items have been critical to identify security issues. The support team is responsive and provides proper guidance.
cons: SOC side response is limited and and still requires large amounts of technical labor

author: christian F.
pros: The endpoint protection service is very easy to use and honestly very streamlined and it integrates well with almost any Kaseya product.
cons: The Kaseya support is not the best and can take a week or more to solve your problem on average.

author: Joe S.
pros: I like the dashboard and the different apps list.
cons: I don't trust that RocketCyber is reliably capturing all the logs they are supposed to.

author: Ron B.
pros: Fast Response by the SOC team. We get calls from them quickly and they are very supportive.
cons: There is always room for more features, but I don't have any issues with it the way it is right now. There is not enough Office 365 integration at this time, but I know it is coming.

author: Michael S.
pros: Transparency into all the data, easily readable and reviewable if you want to review but the SOC team will raise anything important that needs someone to look into. Well worth the money!
cons: I don't have anything currently to say negatively about rocket cyber
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Thomas V.
pros: It gives us quick and easy insights to potention security risks.
cons: There's no consistency between reports. For the same alert (eg new admin user), sometimes only a ticket is generated, sometimes we get a phonecall.

author: Steve N.
pros: Detection & Monitoring has allowed us to be aware of issues that we never knew about
cons: Incident Notification can be more efficient

author: Bernard G.
pros: Monitoring is the most important feature for us.
cons: Would like to see it to be compliant with Criminal Justice Information services (CJIS) as this is the core of our business.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Improvement to Activity is a Game Changer
author: Harry G.
pros: Being notified from the SOC when abnormal activities are detected.
cons: Initial setup could have been more streamlined.

review_title: Good ecosystem and last line of defence
author: Janak P.
pros: Great SOC platform, with active development and solid integrations. Easy to deploy, easy to monitor. Has a wide range of things it can monitor making it ideal for MSP's.
cons: Pricing for stacking on the whole ecosystem means some smaller businesses in Australia are shut out of it.

author: Jeffrey E.
pros: Integrated system alerts and billing. Part of Kaseya One
cons: None at this time. Haven't used it enough yet
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Paul A.
pros: Its great that its part of the Kaseya family - we use other Kaseya/Datto products and its good to have that integrations and common look and feel
cons: We dont have a dedicated SOC team, so more default remediations would be nice
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
